headline: Vinson & Elkins: Two Good to Be True? The SEC Proposes Optional Semiannual Reporting
summary: By Robert L. Kimball, Katherine Terrell Frank, Alex Bahn, Jon Solorzano, Alexandra M. Lewis, Chloe Schmergel, Josh Rutenberg, Randy Thomas, and Matt Turk On May 5, 2026, the SEC proposed to provide public companies the option of filing interim reports semiannually on new Form 10-S instead of quarterly on Form 10-Q.
